Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class UserManagementSettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.UserManagementSettings
public class UserManagementSettings extends Metadata

Java class for UserManagementSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="UserManagementSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="enableCanAnswerContainUsername" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableConcealPersonalInfo" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableContactlessExternalIdentityUsers" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEnhancedConcealPersonalInfo" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEnhancedPermsetMgmt" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEnhancedProfileMgmt" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableNewProfileUI" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableProfileFiltering" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableRestrictEmailDomains" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableScrambleUserData" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableUserSelfDeactivate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="permsetsInFieldCreation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="psaExpirationUIEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="restrictedProfileCloning" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="userAccessPoliciesEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
